title: मसालेदार दही भिंडी रेसिपी | Dahi wali Bhindi | Kunal Kapur Recipes
description:
Looking for a delicious way to make bhindi? This Dahi Wali Bhindi is creamy, tangy, and packed with flavour. Made with simple pantry ingredients, this easy Indian sabzi pairs perfectly with roti, paratha, or steamed rice. It's a comforting everyday recipe that's quick to make and perfect for lunch or dinner.

Ingredients:
For Bhindi 
Okra (भिंडी) - ½ kg
Mustard oil (तेल) -  3 tbsp
Asafoetida (हींग) - ½ tsp 
Green chillies (हरि मिर्च) - 3-4 nos
Ginger, chopped (अदरक) - 2 tsp 
Salt (नमक) - to taste 
Black salt (काला नमक) - 1 tsp 
Amchur/Chaat Masala (अमचूर या चाट मसाला) - 1½ tsp 

For Masala 
Curd (दही) - 1 cup
Salt (नमक) - to taste 
Black salt (काला नमक) - ½ tsp 
Turmeric (हल्दी) - ½ tsp
Kashmiri mirch powder (कश्मीरी मिर्च पाउडर) - 1 tbsp
Coriander powder (धनिया पाउडर) - 2 tsp
Cumin powder (जीरा पाउडर) - 1 tsp 
Garam masala (गरम मसाला) - ½ tsp  
Gram flour (बेसन) - 1 tbsp 

For Cooking 
Mustard oil (सरसों का तेल) - 2 tbsp
Cumin (जीरा) - ½ tsp  
Ginger, chopped (अदरक) 1 tbsp
Garlic, chopped (लहसुन) 1 tbsp
Green chilli, chopped (हरी मिर्च) - 2 nos
Onion, chopped (प्याज़) - ½ cup 
Water (पानी) - 1½ cup (approx)
Kasoori methi powder (कसूरी मेथी पाउडर) -  ½ tsp 
Coriander, chopped (हरा धनिया) - handful


Whether you're a fan of traditional Indian recipes or looking for a new way to cook okra, this recipe is sure to become a favourite.

title: घर पर बनाइए ठंडा-ठंडा आम पन्ना | Aam Panna Recipe | Kunal Kapur Recipes
description:
Nothing beats a chilled glass of homemade Aam Panna on a hot summer day. Made with raw mangoes, aromatic spices, and the perfect balance of sweet, tangy, and refreshing flavours, this traditional Indian summer drink is a seasonal favourite and a great way to stay refreshed.

Aam Panna
Ingredients:
Raw Mango (कच्चा आम) - 750 gms 
Water (पानी) - 2 cups
Sugar (चीनी) - 1½ cups
Hamdard Khaalis Cumin seeds (जीरा) - 2 tsp
Hamdard Khaalis Black pepper (काली मिर्च) - 1 tsp 
Hamdard Khaalis Green cardamom (हरि इलाइची) - 4 nos
Mint (पुदीना) - 1½ cups
Black salt (काला नमक) - 1 tsp 
Salt (नमक) - to taste
Hamdard Khaalis Chaat Masala (चाट मसाला) - 2 tsp 
Chilled Water (ठंडा पानी) - as required
Ice cubes (बर्फ) - handful

title: आलू गोभी सब्जी | Homestyle Aloo Gobhi ki Sabzi | Kunal Kapur Recipes
description:
Nothing beats the comfort of a simple Ghar Wali Aloo Gobhi. Made with potatoes, cauliflower, mustard oil, tomatoes, and everyday Indian spices, this classic sabzi is packed with homestyle flavours that remind you of family meals and comforting lunches.

This is the kind of recipe that doesn't need fancy ingredients - just a few pantry staples and the right technique to create a delicious, flavourful sabzi that pairs perfectly with roti, paratha, or dal-chawal. Whether you're looking for an easy lunch, dinner, or lunchbox recipe, this Aloo Gobhi is one you'll keep coming back to.

In this video, I share my tried-and-tested recipe for a perfectly cooked, masaledar, and homestyle Aloo Gobhi that's simple, wholesome, and full of flavour.

Ghar Wali Aloo Gobhi
Ingredients
Potato, large (आलू) - 2 nos
Cauliflower, large (गोभी) - 1 no 
Salt (नमक) - 1 tsp 
Turmeric (हल्दी) - ½ tsp 
Mustard oi (सरसों तेल) - 5 tbsp
Asafoetida (हींग) - ½ tsp 
Cumin (जीरा) - 1 tsp 
Ginger, chopped (अदरक) - 1 tbsp 
Green chillies, chopped (हरि मिर्च) - 2 nos
Onion, chopped (प्याज़) - ½ cup 
Tomatoes, chopped (टमाटर) - 1 cup 
Salt (नमक) - to taste 
Turmeric powder (हल्दी) - ¾ tsp 
Red chilli powder (मिर्ची पाउडर) - 2 tsp 
Coriander powder (धनिया पाउडर) - 1½ tbsp
Water (पानी) - a dash 
Water (पानी) - a dash 
Chaat masala (चाट मसाला) - 1 tsp 
Garam masala (गर्म मसाला) - a pinch 
Kasoori methi (कसूरी मेथी) - a large pinch 
Coriander, chopped (ताज़ा धनिया) - handful

title: Veg Cheese Corn Sandwich | स्ट्रीट स्टाइल चीज़ सैंडविच तवे पे बनाए | Kunal Kapur Recipes
description:
Today I’m making my absolute favourite Corn & Cheese Sandwich, a crispy, cheesy snack loaded with sweet corn, fresh vegetables, and plenty of mozzarella cheese.

If you’ve been looking for an easy sandwich recipe at home, a quick evening snack, or a delicious tiffin option, this is exactly what you need. I love how this turns out, cheesy, flavourful, and packed with texture in every bite.

Corn & Cheese Sandwich

Ingredients:

For stuffing

Tomato, large (टमाटर) 1 no  
Capsicum, small (शिमला मिर्च) 1 no  
Onion, chopped (प्याज़) ½ cup  
Corn nibblets, boiled (मक्की दाना) 1½ cups  
Chilli flakes (कुट्टी मिर्च) 1 tsp  
Pepper powder (काली मिर्च पाउडर) ½ tsp  
Oregano, dried (ऑरेगैनो) 2 tsp  
Salt (नमक) to taste  
Coriander, chopped (ताज़ा धनिया) handful  
Tomato Ketchup (टमाटर केचप) 2 tbsp  
Garlic, chopped (लहसुन) 1 tsp  
Water (पानी) a dash  
Mozzarella Cheese, grated (चीज़) 1½ cups  
Butter, softened (मखन) 4 tbsp  
Bread slices (ब्रेड स्लाइस) 8 nos  
Mint chutney, thick (पुदीना चटनी) ½ cup

I genuinely love this recipe because it’s simple, comforting, and always a crowd favourite. The combination of sweet corn, melted cheese, and fresh vegetables makes every bite incredibly satisfying. It’s perfect for breakfast, evening snacks, lunch boxes, or whenever you're craving something warm and cheesy.

title: Aapka Jeera Rice Bhi Chipakta Hai? Yeh Secret Dekho | How to Make Perfect Jeera Rice | Kunal Kapur
description:
Jeera rice doesn’t always need a gas stove to come together  -you can make it just as easily in the microwave, which is a great option when you’re low on LPG, travelling, or simply want a quicker, fuss-free method. It’s efficient, uses minimal setup, and still gives you that same comforting, aromatic bowl without standing in the kitchen. Perfect for days when you want something simple, reliable, and stress-free.

Ingredients:
Tempering
Time - 4 mins | Power - 100
Oil (तेल) - 1 tbsp
Black cardamom (काली इलाइची) - 2 nos 
Bay leaves (तेज पत्ता) - 2 nos
Cumin (जीरा) - ½ tsp 
Salt (नमक) - a large pinch
Water (पानी) - 1 cup


Boiled Rice In Microwave 
Time - 10 mins | Microwave Power - Max
Basmati Rice (चावल) - ½ cup
Salt (नमक) - a pinch (optional)
Water (पानी) - 1 cup

Method:
 1. Wash and soak ½ cup basmati rice for 15 to 20 minutes, then drain
 2. In a microwave safe bowl add 1 tbsp oil, 2 black cardamom, 2 bay leaves and ½ tsp cumin seeds. Microwave on Power 100 for 3 minutes
 3. Add rice, 1 cup water and a large pinch of salt to this tempering
 4. Microwave on Max power for 10 minutes till rice is cooked
 5. Gently mix the cooked rice into the tempering
 6. Let it rest for 5 minutes, fluff gently and serve hot

title: Instant Green Chilli Pickle | 5 Min में मिर्च का अचार | Kunal Kapur Recipes
description:
Craving something spicy, tangy, and full of flavour? This instant hari mirch ka chaat (green chilli pickle) is your new go-to! Made in just 5 minutes, this recipe needs no cooking, no vinegar, and no sunlight - perfect for when you want a quick desi condiment without the wait.

It’s bold, zesty, and pairs beautifully with parathas, dal-chawal, khichdi, or even simple roti-sabzi. If you love traditional Indian pickles but don’t have the time for long processes, this one’s a total game-changer.

Instant Green Chilli Pickle
Ingredients  
Green chilli (हरी मिर्च) - 250 gms
Salt (नमक) - 1½ tsp
Fenugreek seeds (मेथी दाना) - 1 tsp 
Kalonji (कलौंजी)- 1 tsp 
Fennel (सौंफ) - 1 tbsp
Mustard seeds (राई) - 2 tbsp
Asafoetida (हींग) - ½ tsp
Turmeric powder (हल्दी) - 1 tsp
Kashmiri red chilli (कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च) - 1½ tsp
Salt (नमक) - 1½ tsp
Mustard oil (सरसों का तेल) - ¼ cup
Vinegar (सिरका) - 3 tbsp

Method:
Wash the green chillies thoroughly and dry them completely (no moisture).
Cut them into halves or small pieces, depending on your preference.
In a mortar-pestle or mixer (pulse mode), coarsely crush:
fenugreek seeds, fennel seeds, mustard seeds, and kalonji.
(Don’t make a fine powder—keep it slightly coarse for texture.)
Heat the mustard oil until it reaches smoking point.
Turn off the flame and let it cool down slightly.
Mix everything together
In a large bowl, add the chopped chillies.
Add salt, turmeric, Kashmiri red chilli powder, hing, and the crushed spices.
Mix well so the chillies are evenly coated.
Add oil & vinegar
Pour the slightly cooled mustard oil over the mixture.
Add vinegar and mix everything really well.
Rest (optional but recommended)
Let it sit for 10–15 minutes so the flavours come together.

title: Dhaniya Paratha Recipe | हरे धनिया का पराठा | Coriander leaves paratha | Kunal Kapur Recipes
description:
Dhaniya Paratha is a vibrant, flavor-packed Indian flatbread that brings together the freshness of coriander with the warmth of everyday मसाले. Soft on the inside and lightly crisp on the outside, this paratha is perfect for breakfast, lunch, or even a quick dinner. The combination of atta and besan gives it a hearty texture, while ginger, green chilli, and herbs add a refreshing kick. Served hot with dahi, pickle, or a dollop of butter, it’s simple comfort food that feels both wholesome and indulgent.

Ingredients
Whole Wheat Flour (आटा) – 1 cup
Gram Flour (बेसन) – ¼ cup
Cumin (जीरा) – ½ tsp
Salt (नमक) – to taste
Ginger, chopped (अदरक) – 2 tsp
Green chilli, chopped (हरी मिर्च) – 2 nos
Onion, chopped (प्याज़) – ¼ cup
Turmeric (हल्दी) – ½ tsp
Chilli powder (मिर्ची पाउडर) – 1 tsp
Chaat masala (चाट मसाला) – 1 tsp
Fresh coriander, chopped (ताज़ा धनिया) – 1½ cups
Mint (पुदीना) – few sprigs
Ghee (घी) – 1 tbsp
Water (पानी) – as required
Ghee (घी) – for smearing
Oil (तेल) – as required

Method
In a large bowl, combine whole wheat flour, gram flour, cumin, salt, turmeric, chilli powder, and chaat masala.
Add chopped ginger, green chillies, onion, fresh coriander, and mint leaves. Mix everything well so the herbs are evenly distributed.
Add ghee and start kneading the mixture, gradually adding water to form a soft, smooth dough.
Cover and let the dough rest for at least 15–20 minutes.
Divide the dough into 4 equal portions (about 110 g each) and shape into pedas.
Roll each peda into a paratha using a rolling pin.
Heat a tawa and cook the paratha on medium flame, applying ghee or oil on both sides, until golden brown spots appear.
Serve hot with curd, pickle, or butter.

title: Ye Chhota Sa Snack Itna Crispy Kaise Hai? Laccha Aloo Se Bana Sabse Crispy Snack | Kunal Kapur
description:
Crispy Lachha Aloo is hands down one of the yummiest snacks you’ll ever try - thinly shredded potatoes fried to golden perfection, light, crunchy, and absolutely addictive. Whether you’re craving a quick evening snack, something to pair with chai, or just want to indulge in a crispy treat, this recipe never disappoints. The texture is what makes it special - perfectly crisp on the outside with that delicate, melt-in-the-mouth bite inside. Made with simple ingredients and minimal effort, this easy crispy potato snack is perfect for both everyday cravings and when you want to impress guests. If you love street-style flavors and quick homemade recipes, this one’s a must-try.

Crispy Potato 
Ingredients 
Potato (आलू) - ½ kg
Salt (नमक) - to taste
Corn starch (कॉर्नस्टार्च) - 2 tbsp (approx)
Oil (तेल) - for frying

Method
To make crispy laccha aloo, start by cutting potatoes into evenly sized juliennes. Dip them in cold water for 2-3 minutes. Then, drain the potatoes, add salt, and leave for 10 minutes. Next, squeeze out the excess water, add corn starch, and mix well. Shape the potatoes by swirling them with a fork and drop them into hot oil. Your crispy laccha aloo is ready to serve.

title: Ashtami Special | Halwa Puri Chana | Kunal Kapur Recipes
description:
Ashtami prasad, made with love ✨

Fluffy sooji halwa, perfectly spiced kala chana, and golden puris - each bite full of warmth, tradition, and devotion.

Aaj bana mere kitchen main and I’m sharing the most foolproof recipe with you guys - recreate it at home tomorrow, share it with your loved ones, and celebrate the joy of giving, gratitude, and festive flavours. 🌼

Ingredients

For Chana:
Kala Chana (boiled) – 2cups
Oil – 3 tbsp
Cumin seeds – 1 tsp
Green chilli – 1no
Ginger chopped – 2tsp
Turmeric powder – ½ tsp
Chilli powder – 1 tsp
Coriander powder – 1 tbsp
Salt
Ghee – 1 tbsp
For poori:
Wheat flour – 2 cups
Salt – ½ tsp
Water – as required
Oil – 1 tbsp
Suji Halwa
For Syrup:
Water – 3cups
Sugar – ¾ cup
Cardamom powder – ½ tsp
For Halwa:
Ghee – ⅔ cup
Suji (semolina) – 1cup
Dry fruits chopped – handful

Method

Chana
* Heat oil, add cumin seeds and let them splutter.
* Add green chilli and ginger, sauté briefly.
* Add turmeric, chilli powder, coriander powder and salt.
* Add boiled kala chana, mix well and cook for 5–7 minutes (add a little water if needed).
* Finish with ghee and set aside.

Poori
* Mix wheat flour, salt and oil.
* Add water and knead into a stiff dough. Rest for 10–15 minutes.
* Divide into small balls, roll into discs.
* Deep fry in hot oil till puffed and golden.

Halwa
* Boil water, sugar and cardamom powder till sugar dissolves (keep warm).
* Heat ghee, add suji and roast till golden and aromatic.
* Add dry fruits, sauté briefly.
* Carefully add warm syrup, stirring continuously.
* Cook till thick and it leaves the sides of the pan.

Serve
* Serve hot poori with kala chana and suji halwa ✨

title: Vrat ka Halwa | 2-ingredient Easy Halwa | Navratri Dessert Recipe | Kunal Kapur Recipes
description:
If you’re craving something rich, comforting, and quick to make, this khoya (mawa) halwa is exactly what you need. It comes together in minutes but tastes like something truly festive and indulgent.

Made with just a handful of ingredients, this is one of those classic Indian desserts that never fails - perfect for celebrations, last-minute guests, or simply when you want something sweet without too much effort.

Khoya Halwa

Ingredients
Khoya (खोया) -  500 gm

For Sugar Syrup
Water (पानी) -  1 cup 
Sugar (चीनी) - 2 tbsp

Sugar (चीनी) - 2 tbsp
Ghee (घी) - 1 tbsp 
Cardamom powder (इलाइची पाउडर) - ¾ tsp
Nutmeg powder (जायफल पाउडर) - ½ tsp
Dry fruits, chopped (ड्राई फ्रूट्स) - handful

Method
Prepare the sugar syrup:
In a pan, add water and sugar. Let it simmer until the sugar dissolves completely. Keep aside.
Cook the khoya:
Heat ghee in a heavy-bottom pan. Crumble the khoya and add it to the pan. Cook on low flame, stirring continuously, until it softens and releases a rich aroma.
Add sugar & syrup:
Add the sugar and prepared sugar syrup to the khoya. Mix well and continue cooking on low flame.
Cook till thick:
Keep stirring until the mixture thickens and starts leaving the sides of the pan, turning glossy and halwa-like.
Finish with flavour:
Add cardamom powder and nutmeg powder. Mix well.
Garnish & serve:
Top with chopped dry fruits and serve warm.

title: Appe Recipe | South Indian Appe | Kunal Kapur Recipes
description:
Crispy on the outside, soft and cheesy inside - these masala cheese appe are my kind of perfect breakfast / chai-time snack. Light, flavourful, and packed with little bursts of spice, they’re the kind of bite-sized treats that disappear the moment they hit the table.

Masala cheese Appe (makes 36 appe)
Ingredients 
Semolina - 1 cup 
Curd - ¾ cup 
Salt - 1 tsp (to taste)
Water - 1 cup 
Peppercorn - 15 nos
Oil - 2 tbsp 
Drty red chillies - 2 nos
Asafoetida - ½ tsp 
Mustard seeds - 1 tsp 
Cumin - 1 tsp 
Channa dal - 2 tsp 
Urad dal - 1 tsp 
Ginger, chopped - 2 tsp 
Green chilli, chopped - 2 nos
Curry leaves - a sprig 
Carrot, grated - ½ cup 
Onion, chopped - ½ cup 
Coriander,  chopped - handful 
Baking powder/Eno - 1 tsp 
Oil - gentle spray
Cheese cubes - few (optional)
Oil - gentle spray

Method
1. In a bowl, combine semolina, curd, salt and water to make a smooth batter. Let it rest for 10–15 minutes so the semolina softens.
2. Heat 2 tbsp oil in a pan. Add peppercorns and dry red chillies and sauté briefly.
3. Add asafoetida, mustard seeds, cumin, chana dal and urad dal. Let them crackle and turn lightly golden.
4. Add chopped ginger, green chilli and curry leaves. Sauté until fragrant.
5. Add grated carrot and chopped onion and cook for 2–3 minutes until slightly softened. Turn off the heat and mix in chopped coriander.
6. Add this tempering to the rested batter and mix well.
7. Just before cooking, add baking powder/eno and gently mix.
8. Heat an appe pan and lightly spray oil in each cavity. Pour some batter, place a small cube of cheese in the centre (optional), and cover with a little more batter.
9. Cook on medium heat, turning occasionally, until the appe are golden and crisp on all sides.
10. Serve hot with green chutney or ketchup.

title: Moong Dal ke Pakode - 2 ways | Holi Special Recipe | Palak ke Pakode
description:
✨ The Pakode You’ll Keep Coming Back To: Crispy Moong Dal Pakode (2 Ways)! 🌧️☕

Nothing beats the comfort of hot, crispy pakode — especially when they’re light, flavourful, and made with moong dal.

These Moong Dal Pakode are crunchy on the outside, soft inside, and packed with spices that make every bite irresistible 😍

Made with soaked moong dal, fresh ginger, green chilli, curry leaves, and a fragrant spice blend, these pakode are perfect for chai-time, rainy evenings, or whenever you’re craving something homemade and comforting.

You can enjoy them two ways — classic plain or with spinach for that extra bite and colour.

👨‍🍳 Pro Tips from this Video:✅ Grind the dal coarse — not smooth — for the best texture.✅ Don’t overdo the water; the batter should be thick and airy.✅ A pinch of baking soda / Eno right before frying keeps the pakode light and fluffy.✅ Fry on medium heat so they cook through and turn perfectly crisp.
Serve them hot with green chutney or ketchup and enjoy them straight off the kadhai!


Moong Dal Pakora (2 ways) 
Prep Time: 4–5 hours (soaking) + 15 minutes
Cooking Time: 15–20 minutes
Serves: 3–4

For Spices
Cumin (जीरा) - 1½ tsp 
Coriander seeds (धनिया बीज) - 2 tbsp
Black pepper (काली मिर्च) - 1 tbsp

For Batter 
Moong dal, skinless (मूंग दाल धुली) - 1 cup 
Water (पानी) - a dash 
Green Chilli, chopped (हरि मिर्च) - 2 nos 
Ginger, chopped (अदरक) - 1 tbsp
Spinach, chopped (पालक) - ½ cup (optional)
Onion, chopped (प्याज़) - ½ cup 
Curry Leaves (कड़ी पत्ता)- 10-12 leaves 
Salt (नमक) - to taste
Turmeric Powder (हल्दी) - ¾ tsp 
Chilli Powder (मिर्ची पाउडर) - 1½ tsp 
Kasoori methi leaves (कसूरी मेथी) - a large pinch  
Dry Mango Powder (अमचूर) - 2 tsp 
Coriander, chopped (ताज़ा धनिया) - handful 
Baking soda/powder or Eno (बेकिंग सोडा या पाउडर या ईनो) - 1 tsp 
Oil (तेल) - for deep frying

METHOD
Step 1: Prepare the Spice Mix
1. Dry roast cumin, coriander seeds, and black pepper on low heat till aromatic.
2. Cool slightly and grind into a coarse powder. Keep aside.

Step 2: Prepare the Dal Batter
1. Soak moong dal for 4–5 hours. Drain completely.
2. Grind the dal using very little water to a coarse, thick batter. Do not make it smooth.
3. Transfer the batter to a bowl and whisk lightly to incorporate air.

Step 3: Flavour the Batter
1. Add green chilli, ginger, onion, curry leaves, coriander leaves, salt, turmeric, chilli powder, kasoori methi, dry mango powder, and the prepared spice mix.
2. Mix gently to combine.
3. Divide the batter into two portions.
    * Keep one plain.
    * Add chopped spinach to the second portion and mix lightly.

Step 4: Frying the Pakode
1. Heat oil in a kadhai on medium heat.
2. Just before frying, add baking soda / Eno to the batter and mix gently.
3. Drop small portions of batter into hot oil using your fingers or a spoon.
4. Fry on medium heat, turning occasionally, till golden and crisp.
5. Remove and drain on absorbent paper.

Step 5: Serve
Serve hot with green chutney, imli chutney, or ketchup, along with a cup of hot chai.
Try this recipe and tell me — plain or spinach, which one’s your favourite? 👇

title: Healthy Chole Salad Recipe | High Protein Kabuli Chana Salad for Weight Loss
description:
✨ The Only Salad You’ll Crave: Warm & Comforting Chole Salad! 🥗

Bored of eating cold, raw vegetables for your diet? You have to try this Warm Chickpea Salad that is super easy, highly nutritious, and tastes absolutely amazing! 😋

In this recipe, we give our onions, red capsicum, and tomatoes a quick 30-second toss instead of eating them raw. This small step completely changes the flavor, taking away the raw bite and making the salad incredibly comforting. Tossed with a special mix of Chole Masala, Chaat Masala, black salt, and lots of lemon juice, this protein-rich Kabuli Chana salad will become your new favorite meal.

👨‍🍳 Pro Tips from this Video:
✅ Use only Red Capsicum (Sweet Pepper), avoid green as its flavor is too strong for this recipe!
✅ Do not mash the veggies while cooking; just give them a quick toss on high heat so they stay vibrant.
✅ Don't worry about the red color—it's just Kashmiri Red Chilli for a beautiful look and aroma, it’s not spicy at all!

Perfect for a light lunch or a quick dinner. Try it out and let me know how you liked it in the comments below! 👇

description:
Festivities hon ya koi khushi ka mauka, bina Meethe ke sab adhoora hai! 🎇

Aaj hum banayenge sabka favorite aur bohot hi swadisht — Chana Dal Halwa. Is recipe ki sabse achi baat yeh hai ki yeh sirf kitchen mein milne wali basic cheezon jaise Chana Dal, Ghee, aur Sugar se ban jata hai. 

Maine is video mein kuch khaas tips share kiye hain jisse aapka halwa ekdum perfect, soft, aur daanedaar banega. Agar aapko Moong Dal Halwa pasand hai lekin uski mehnat se dar lagta hai, toh yeh quick version aapke liye perfect hai! 

Recipe try karein aur batayein aapko kaisi lagi! ❤️

Don't forget to Like, Share, and Subscribe!

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Chana Dal Halwa

Ingredients: 
Chana dal (चना दाल) - 1 cup
Ghee (घी) - ½ cup 
Green cardamom (इलाइची) - 10 nos
Black cardamom (काली इलाइची) - 1 no 
Water (पानी) - 1 cup
Sugar (चीनी) - 6 tbsp
Saffron - (केसर)  a  pinch
Milk (दूध) - 1½ cups
Ghee (घी) - 2 tbsp 
Cashew Nut | Almonds | Pista chopped - handful
(काजू बादाम पिस्ता)

title: Kadhai Paneer bhool jaoge jab banoge yeh Tasty Paneer Capsicum Masala! Lunch/Dinner | Kunal Kapur
description:
👉🏻  Buy my favourite kitchen equipment here: https://vbdace.com/

Kadhai, Shimla Mirch, soft Paneer, aur masalon ki khushboo—aapko is Paneer-Capsicum se pyaar ho jayega! 

Aaj hum wahi purana childhood wala swad recreate karenge jo humari maa ghar pe banaya karti thi. Is recipe mein humne crunch aur softness ka ek perfect balance rakha hai, jo ise Kadhai Paneer se ekdum alag aur khaas banata hai. Soft paneer ko spices mein roast karke aur crunchy capsicum ke saath mix karke jo swad aata hai, uska koi muqabla nahi. 

Iss video mein maine kuch special tips share kiye hain jisse paneer ekdum soft rahega aur masale bilkul restaurant style lagenge. Is tasty dish ko garma-garam roti ya paratha ke saath enjoy karein! 

Recipe try karein aur comment section mein batayein ki aapko yeh kaisi lagi! ❤️

Don't forget to Like, Share, and Subscribe!

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Paneer Shimla Mirch 

Ingredients:
For marinating paneer 
Paneer (पनीर) - 400 gms
Salt (नमक) - 1 tsp 
Turmeric (हल्दी) - ½ tsp 
Chilli powder (मिर्ची पाउडर) - 1 tsp 

For Masala:
Cumin (जीरा) - 2 tsp 
Coriander seeds (धनिया बीज) - 1½ tbsp
Peppercorns (काली मिर्च) - 1 tbsp

Mustard oil (सरसों तेल) - 5 tbsp
Dry red chilli (सूखी लाल मिर्च) - 3 nos
Garlic, chopped (लहसुन) - 1 tbsp
Ginger, chopped (अदरक) - 1 tbsp
Green chilli, chopped (हरि मिर्च) - 1-2 nos
Onion, chopped (प्याज़) - 1 cup
Turmeric powder (हल्दी) - ¾ tsp 
Kashmiri chilli powder (कश्मीरी मिर्च पाउडर) - 2 tsp 
Coriander powder (धनिया पाउडर) - 1½ tbsp
Kitchen King Masala (किचन किंग मसाला) - 1 tbsp
Tomato (टमाटर) - 5 nos
Salt (नमक) - to taste
Tomato, chopped (टमाटर) - 1 cup 
Capsicum, medium (शिमला मिर्च) - 1 no 
Onion, large (प्याज़) - 1 nos
Tomato, medium (टमाटर) - 1 no  
Water (पानी) - ½ cup

Mustard oil (सरसों तेल) - 3 tbsp
Salt (नमक) - to taste
Kasoori methi (कसूरी मेथी) - large pinch 
Coriander, chopped (ताज़ा धनिया) - handful

title: Zero Oil, Full Protein: Yeh Salad Dieting ka Game Badal Dega! | Kunal Kapur Recipes
description:
Weight loss ka matlab boring khana nahi hota! ✨

Presenting a "Zero Oil" Salad Dressing recipe jo na sirf creamy aur tasty hai, balki protein se bhi bharpur hai. Isme humne peanuts aur paneer ka use kiya hai to give it that rich texture without a single drop of oil.

Whether you are hitting the gym or just want to eat clean, this recipe is a must-try!

✅ Recipe Highlights:
Oil-free & Heart Healthy
Rich in Vegetarian Protein
Super Creamy & Fresh
Loaded with Fiber

Dressing ko aap 2 days tak fridge mein store bhi kar sakte hain. Try it today and tag me!

#HealthyEating #OilFreeRecipes #HighProteinSalad #WeightLossDiet #HinglishRecipes #CleanEating #FitnessFood #SaladDressingSecret

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Healthy Salad with No Oil Dressing 

Ingredients:
For Dressing 
Peanut (मूंगफली) - 75 gms(½ cups)
Paneer (पनीर) - 150 gms

Roasted cumin (भुना जीरा) - 1 tsp

Pepper powder (काली मिर्च पाउडर) - ½ tsp 
Hung curd (गढ़ी दही) - 2 tbsp
Lemon, small (नींबू) - ½ no
Milk (दूध) - 175 ml (⅔ cups)

For Salad:  
Tofu, diced (टोफू) - ½ cup  
Brocolli florets (ब्रोकली) - ½ cup  
Red capsicum, diced (लाल शिमला मिर्च) - ½ cup 
Avocado, small (अवोकेडो) - 1 no 
Corn niblets, boiled (उबला मक्की दाना) - ½ cup 
Cucumber, diced (खीरा) - 1 cup 
Black Chickpeas, boiled (उबला काला चना) - 1 cup 
Onion, finely chopped (प्याज़) - ¼ cup
Cherry tomatoes, quartered (चेरी टमाटर) - ½ cup 
Basil, chopped (बेसिल) - few sprigs
Salt (नमक) - to taste
Pepper powder (काली मिर्च पाउडर) - ¾ tsp 
Lemon juice (नींबू रस) - ¼ cup 
Lettuce leaves (सलाद पत्ता) - handful

description:
✨ Boriyat Se Break Lijiye, Masala Dum Arbi Banaiye! 😋

Body: Aaj hum banayenge Masala Dum Arbi, ek aisi recipe jo Arbi ke boring taste ko ek dum "Wow" bana degi! 🌟

Many people struggle with Arbi becoming sticky or slimy. In this video, I’m sharing my Top 3 Secrets to make Arbi that is perfectly crispy from the outside but melts in your mouth from the inside. We will cook it on "Dum" in a rich Dahi-Onion gravy that tastes amazing with Paratha or Rice.

👨‍🍳 Chef's Tips in this Video:
The Boiling Hack: Why you must add extra salt while boiling Arbi? 
The Curd Trick: How to prevent Dahi from curdling in the gravy? 
The "Crispy" Step: Why frying the boiled Arbi is non-negotiable! 

Agar aapko lagta hai ki Arbi tasty nahi ho sakti, toh ye video aapki soch badal dega. Try it out and tell me in the comments! 👇

#MasalaArbi #ArbiKiSabzi #ChefKunal #IndianCurry #VegetarianRecipes #DumArbi #DinnerIdeas #LunchBoxRecipes #DesiFood

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Masala Dum Arbi 
FOR BOILING 
Arbi, medium (अरबी) -  16 nos/500 gms
Salt (नमक) - 1 tbsp

For Tempering
Mustard Oil (सरसों तेल) - 3 tbsp
Ajwain (अजवाइन)  - ½ tsp 
Ginger, chopped (अदरक) - 2 tsp 
Salt (नमक) - to taste
Black salt (काला नमक) - ½ tsp 

FOR GRAVY 
Mustard Oil (सरसों तेल) - 5 tbsp
Heeng (हींग) - ½ tsp 
Ajwain (अजवाइन) - ½ tsp 
Cumin (जीरा) - 1 tsp

Ginger, chopped (अदरक) - 2 tsp 
Green chilli (हरि मिर्च) - 2 nos

Water (पानी)  - ½ cup 
Turmeric (हल्दी) - ½ tsp 
Kashmiri Chilli powder (कश्मीरी मिर्च पाउडर)  - 2 tsp 
Coriander powder (धनिया पाउडर) - 1½ tbsp
Salt (नमक) - to taste
Black salt (काला नमक) - ¾ tsp 
Curd (दही) - ½ cup 
Tomato, chopped (टमाटर) - 1½ cups
Water (पानी) - 2 cups 
Kasoori methi (कसूरी मेथी) - a large pinch 
Coriander, chopped (ताज़ा धनिया) - handful
Garam masala powder (गर्म मसाला पाउडर) - a pinch

title: Til Papdi Recipe | 2 Ways Sugar & Jaggery | मकर संक्रांति स्पेशल | Kunal Kapur Lohri Recipe
description:
Celebrate the warmth of winter and the festive spirit of Makar Sankranti and Lohri with this delicious Til Papdi recipe! 🪁❄️

In this video, we’ll show you how to make these crispy sesame treats in two simple ways—using Sugar for that classic glass-like crunch and Jaggery (Gur) for a rich, traditional flavor. We also share tips on how to roast your sesame seeds perfectly and roll the papdi paper-thin without it sticking.

Whether you are making them for a festival offering or just a healthy winter snack, these Til Papdis are sure to be a hit. Don't forget to try both versions and tell us which one is your favorite!

#TilPapdi #MakarSankranti #LohriSpecial #WinterRecipes #SesameSeeds #IndianSweets #KunalKapurRecipes #HomemadeSweets #TilChikki

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Til Papdi
Ingredients:

With sugar 
Til (तिल) - ½ cup (70 gms)
Sugar (चीनी) - ½ cup (100 gms)
Ghee (घी) - 2 tsp 
Green cardamom seeds (इलाइची दाना) - 2 tsp
Pista sliced (पिस्ता) - 2 tbsp

With Jaggery 
Til (तिल) - ½ cup (65 gms)
Green cardamom seeds (इलाइची दाना) - 2 tsp
Jaggery, chopped (गुड) - ½ cup (100 gms)
Water - 4 tbsp 
Ghee (घी) - 2 tsp 
Pista sliced (पिस्ता) - 2 tbsp

description:
Want to know the secret to that bright green, restaurant-style Palak Paneer? It’s all about the Ice Bath and the Double Garlic Tadka! 🟢🧄

In this video, I’m sharing my authentic recipe for Lasooni Palak Paneer. Unlike regular Palak Paneer, this version uses "burnt" garlic (Lasoon) to infuse a smoky, nutty flavor that completely transforms the dish. No heavy cream needed—just pure flavor!

In this video, you will learn: 
✅ How to keep spinach bright green (blanching hack). 
✅ The difference between Saag and Palak Paneer. 
✅ How to make the perfect "Burnt Garlic" Tadka. 
✅ Tips for soft, melt-in-your-mouth Paneer.

title: Sirf Doodh Aur Cheeni Se Banti Hai Ye Pahadi Mithai! | Bal Mithai | Bal Mithai | Chef Kunal Kapur
description:
Aaj main bana raha hoon Uttarakhand ki shaan aur Almora ki jaan - Famous Bal Mithai! Bahut logon ko lagta hai ki ismein chocolate hoti hai, par sach toh ye hai ki ismein chocolate ka ek daana bhi nahi hai! 🍫❌ This is actually "Roasted Khoya Fudge" coated with sugar balls.

In this video, I will share the traditional Halwai secret on how to roast the Mawa correctly to get that signature dark colour and chewy texture without burning it. If you love Indian sweets or want to try something unique this winter, this recipe is for you.

#balmithai #balmithairecipe  #chefkunalkapur #kunalkapurrecipe #chocolatefudgerecipe #winterdessert  #KunalKapurRecipes #UttarakhandFood #AlmoraBalMithai #IndianSweets #MithaiRecipe #ChefKunal #WinterSweets #pahadifood 

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Bal Mithai 
Prep time - 5 mins
Cooking time - 25 mins
Serves - 8
Makes - 1200 gms approx


Ingredients:
For Sugar Syrup (1 cup sugar = 225 gms) 
Sugar (चीनी) - 280 gms/ 1¼ cup approx
Water (पानी) - 300 ml/ 1¼ cup approx

For Khoya Mixture
Ghee (घी) - 2 tbsp
Khoya, grated (खोया) - 1kg/ 8½ cups
Sugar (चीनी) - 110 gms/ ½ cup approx
Sugar Balls (चीनी के गोले) - 1 cup

title: Mirch Ajwain Ke Parothe | Ghar Ka Khaana | मम्मी के हाथ की गरम-गरम परोठी | Winter Spl | Kunal Kapur
description:
This Mirchi Ajwain Paratha recipe will teleport you to the good old days of childhood where winters brought such amazing aromas.

Made by my mom, this used to be my favourite breakfast growing up and now it can be yours too.

Try this and it'll become a staple at your home. 

#ajwainkeparothe #mirchajwainparantha #paratha #parantharecipe #chefkunal #kunalkapur #gharkakhaana 

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Mirch Ajwain Paratha
Prep time - 10 mins
Cooking time - 15 mins
Serves - 2

Ingredients
For dough 
Atta - 2 cup
Salt 
Water - ¾ cup

For filling
Salt
Chilli flakes
Coriander powder
Ajwain
Ghee

Method: 
Begin by kneading a medium-soft dough using salt, water, and whole wheat flour. Let the dough rest for 5 minutes. After resting, cut the dough into small portions (pedas), roll them in dry flour, and let them rest for an additional 2 minutes. Then, roll each portion out into discs with light pressure to ensure they spread evenly.
Next, spread ghee on top of each disc and sprinkle it with salt, carom seeds, coriander powder, and chili flakes. Shape the discs as demonstrated in the video.
Heat some ghee in a tawa (flat pan), and cook the parathas on both sides until they puff up and turn golden brown. Your mirch ajwain ka parantha is ready to be enjoyed!

description:
Loved by every home in Gujarat and Maharashtra, Bhakarwadi is more than just a snack; it’s an emotion! 
Crispy, tangy, sweet, and spicy, it packs all your favorite flavors into one perfect bite.

It’s time this nostalgic treat reaches every corner of India. 
So, let’s roll up our sleeves and make the perfect Bhakarwadi Namkeen right here in our Namkeen Ki Dukaan!

#bhakarwadirecipe #bhakarwadi #snacks #snackcares4u #snackslovers #snacksinhindi #indianrecipe #chefkunalkapur #chefkunal #masterchefrecipes 

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Bhakarwadi
Ingredients 

Imli Chutney
Water (पानी) - 4½ cups
Tamarind (इमली) - ½ cup 
Sugar (चीनी) - 1¼ cup 
Salt (नमक) - to taste
Black salt (काला नमक) - 1 tsp  
Kashmiri chilli powder (कश्मीरी मिर्च पाउडर) - 1 tbsp 
Cumin, roasted & pounded (भुना जीरा कुट्टा हुआ) - 2 tbsp 

For the Dough 
All purpose flour (मैदा) - 2 cup
Gram flour (बेसन) - 3 tbsp
Salt (नमक) - ¾ tsp
Carom Seed (अजवाईन) - 1 tsp
Oil (तेल) - 3 tbsp
Water - as required

For Filling
Cumin Seed (जीरा) - 1 tbsp 
Coriander Seed (साबुत धनिया) - 2 tbsp
Fennel seeds (सौंफ) - 2 tbsp
Sesame seeds (तिल) - 2 tbsp
Desiccated coconut (सूखा नारियल बुरादा) - 3 tbsp
Salt (नमक) - 1½ tsp 
Chilli Powder (मिर्च पाउडर) - 1 tbsp
Turmeric (हल्दी) - ½ tsp
Asafoetida (हींग) - ¾ tsp
Ginger Powder (अदरक पाउडर) - 1 tbsp
Sugar (चीनी) - 2-3 tbsp
Imli chutney (इमली चटनी) - 1½ tbsp

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

title: Easy Bread ka Halwa | ब्रेड हलवा रेसेपी - ब्रेड का हलवा वेज रेसेपी | Dessert Recipe | Kunal Kapur
description:
Some recipes are close to heart, not because they bring back happy memories but they give hope. Even when the times are bleak, there's always a silver lining. For Punjabi refugees, back in 1947, it was this Bread Halwa that kept them going.

Let's celebrate the sacrifices of our ancestors and make this recipe atleast once to understand how flavors play an important role in happiness and in struggle.

Buy all the LLM kitchen utensils used in this video here: https://bit.ly/KunalKapurLLM
Use Code: KUNAL01 at checkout :) 

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Bread Halwa
Serves - 2-3

Ingredients:
Brown Bread slices (ब्रेड स्लाइस) - 7nos (190 gms) 
Ghee (घी) - 3 tbsp 
Water (पानी) - 1¼ cup (300 ml)
Milk (दूध) - ½ cup (120 ml)
Sugar (चीनी) - ½ cup (100 grams)
Cardamom powder (इलाइची पाउडर) - ½ tsp 
Pista, chopped (पिस्ता) - 2 tbsp
Almonds, chopped (बादाम) - 2 tbsp
Cashewnuts, chopped (काजू) - 2 tbsp 
Ghee (घी) - 1 tbsp

description:
Made with the goodness of 4 nutritious dals, this Dal Uttapam is everything you need to kickstart your day. Choose any 4 of your favourite dals (lentils) and make this power packed recipe for you loved ones.

Stuffed with healthy vegetables and taste, this recipe is worth trying. Kyuki iske taste ki guarantee meri hai!

#Dalkauttapam #uttapam #nashta #snacks #snacksrecipe #snackslovers

Mix Dal Ka Uttapam

Chana Dal (चना दाल) - ¼ cup

title: खिचड़ी कुकर में कैसे बनाये | Pressure Cooker Dal Khichdi | Millet Masala Khichdi | Kunal Kapur Recipe
description:
Wholesome, nutritious, and packed with flavors—today, I've prepared Millet Masala Khichdi a Pressure Cooker.


Millet Masala Khichdi to make your meal healthier, tastier and soul-filling.

This khichdi is made up with four types of millets which compensate for your daily fibre intake.

Toh banao ye tasty khichdi and serve it with you favourite accompaniment.

#milletkhichri #khichdi #millets #milletrecipe #masalakhichdirecipe #lunch #dinner #chefkunalkapur #kunalkapurrecipes 

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Millet Masala Khichdi 
Serves 4 - 6 / 8 cups (6+2)

Ingredients:
Foxtail Millet (कँगनी) - ¼ cup
Pearl Millet (बाजरा) -¼ cup
Sorghum (जवार) - ¼ cup
Barnyard Millet (समक के चावल) - ¼ cup
Moong dhuli dal – ¼ cup
Masoor dal (मूँग दाल) – ¼ cup
Toor dal (तूर दाल) – ½ cup
Turmeric (हल्दी) – ½ tsp
Salt (नमक)  – 1 tsp
Water (पानी) – 7 cups

For Tempering:
Ghee (घी) – 3 tbsp
Dry Red Chilli (सूखी लाल मिर्च) – 2 nos
Heeng (हींग) – ½ tsp
Mustard seeds (सरसों दाना) – 2 tsp
Cumin (जीरा) – 2 tsp
Curry leaves (कड़ी पत्ता) – a sprig
Onion chopped (प्याज़) – ½ cup
Ginger chopped (अदरक) – 2 tsp
Garlic chopped (लहसुन) – 1 tbsp
Green chilli chopped (हरि मिर्च) – 1 no
Turmeric (हल्दी) – ½ tsp
Chilli powder (मिर्च पाउडर) – 1 tsp
Salt (नमक) - to taste
Tomato chopped (टमाटर) – 1 cup
Water (पानी)– as required
Kasoori methi powder (कसूरी मेथी पाउडर)– a pinch
Lemon (नींबू) – ½ no
Coriander chopped (ताज़ा धनिया) – handful

For Complete Recipe - https://www.chefkunalkapur.com/recipe/millet-masala-khichdi/

Kala Chana Poori

Makes - 10 small pooris
Ingredients
For Poori Dough
Whole Wheat Flour (आटा) - 2 cups

title: गरमा गरम समोसा चाट बनाने का तरीक़ा | Punjabi Samosa Chaat | Kunal Kapur Snacks | Street Food India
description:
Monsoons are here and it's making me crave something savory! How about some home made, delicious Samosa Chaat?

#samosachaat #samosa #samosarecipe #samosatips #samosalove #samosasrecipe #snacks #snacks #snackideas #snackcares4u #snackfoodies #snackrecipe #chefkunalkapur 

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Samosa Chaat

**For Samosa Dough**
- All-purpose flour (मैदा) – 2 cups
- Salt (नमक) – a generous pinch
- Carom Seeds (अजवाइन) – a pinch
- Ghee (घी) – ¼ cup
- Chilled Water (ठंडा पानी) – ½ cup approx
- Oil (तेल) – for frying

**For Stuffing**
- Oil (तेल) – 3 tbsp
- Heeng (हींग) – ½ tsp
- Coriander seeds, cracked (कुट्टा धनिया) – 1 tbsp
- Cumin, cracked (कुट्टा जीरा) – 2 tsp
- Green chilli, chopped (हरि मिर्च) – 2 nos
- Ginger, chopped (अदरक) – 2 tsp
- Chilli powder (मिर्ची पाउडर) – 1 tsp
- Turmeric (हल्दी) – ½ tsp
- Coriander powder (धनिया पाउडर) – 1 tbsp
- Potato medium, boiled (उबला आलू) – 6 nos
- Salt (नमक) – to taste
- Black salt (काला नमक) – ½ tsp
- Chaat masala (चाट मसाला) – 1 tsp
- Coriander, chopped (ताज़ा धनिया) – handful

**For Sweet Curd**
- Curd (दही) – 2 cups
- Sugar, powdered (पीसी चीनी) – 4 tbsp
- Black Salt (काला नमक) – a pinch

**For Theekhi Chutney**
- Mint leaves (पुदीना) – 1 cup
- Coriander Leaves (ताज़ा धनिया) – 2 cups
- Green chillies (हरि मिर्च) – 2 nos
- Ginger (अदरक) – a tiny piece
- Roasted cumin (भुना जीरा) – 1 tsp
- Salt (नमक) – to taste
- Black salt (काला नमक) – ½ tsp
- Chaat masala (चाट मसाला) – 1 tsp
- Lemon, small (नींबू) – 2 nos
- Chilled water (ठंडा पानी) – a dash

**For Assembly**
- Pomegranate seeds (अनार) – ½ cup
- Nylon sev (बारीक सेव) – handful
- Ginger, Julienne (अदरक) – handful
- Coriander sprigs (ताज़ा धनिया)

**Tamarind Chutney**
**Ingredients**
- ½ cup tamarind pulp (dried)
- ½ cup seedless dates
- 3 cup water
- ½ cup jaggery
- ½ tsp fennel powder
- 1 tsp coriander powder
- ½ tsp cumin powder
- 1 tsp kashmiri chilli powder
- ½ tsp dry ginger powder
- Salt

**Note**
- Total dough weight after kneading: 410 gms (approx)
- 26 mini samosas, 15 gms of dough for each samosa (approx)

title: Special Masala Shikanji | Lychee Jamun Mango Lemonade | Kunal Kapur Drinks Recipe Mojito Nimbu pani
description:
Beat this excruciating summer heat with not 1, not 2 but 4 flavorful Masala Shikanji. Prepare the Shikanji Masala in bulk and use it to make different flavors of shikanji like Mango, Jamun, Litchi, etc.

#nimbupaani #nimbupani #masalalemonade #lemonade #lemonjuice #lycheejuice #mangojuice #jamunjuice 

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Masala Shikanji 4 Ways - Lychee, Jamun, Mango & Masala
Ingredients -

For Shikanji masala
Cumin (जीरा) - 1 tbsp
Coriander seeds (धनिया बीज) - 1 tbsp
Black pepper (काली मिर्च) - ½ tbsp
Cloves (लौंग) - 9 nos
Dry ginger powder (सौंठ पाउडर) - ½ tbsp
Mint powder (पुदीना पाउडर) - ½ tbsp
Black salt (कला नमक) - 1 tsp 
Salt (नमक) - ½ tsp 


For Masala Shikanji
Sugar (चीनी) - 1½ tbsp
Mint leaves (पुदीना पत्ता) - few leaves 
Shikanji masala (शिकंजी मसाला) - ¾ tsp 
Water (पानी) - a dash 
Lemon, medium (नींबू) - 1½ nos 
Ice cubes (बर्फ) - 4-5 nos
Chilled Water (ठंडा पानी) -  300ml / 1¼ cups
Lemon wedges (नींबू टुकड़ा) - for garnish 

For Lychee Shikanji
Lychee, small (लीची) - 14 nos
Lemon, medium (नींबू) - 1½ nos 
Chilled Water (ठंडा पानी) -  300ml / 1¼ cups
Shikanji masala (शिकंजी मसाला) - ½ tsp 
Sugar (चीनी) - 1½ tbsp
Basil seeds, soaked (सब्जा) - 1 tbsp
Lemon wedges (नींबू टुकड़ा) - for garnish 

For Jamun Shikanji
(1 cup- 15nos- 170gms)
Jamun (जामुन) - 12-15 nos/ 1 cup 
Sugar (चीनी) - 1½ tbsp
Shikanji masala (शिकंजी मसाला) - ¾ tsp 
Lemon, medium (नींबू) - 1½ nos 
Mint leaves (पुदीना पत्ता) - few leaves 
Ice cubes (बर्फ) - 4-5 nos
Chilled Water (ठंडा पानी) -  300ml / 1¼ cups

For Mango Shikanji
Mango, medium (आम) - 1 no
Lemon, medium (नींबू) - 1½ nos 
Sugar (चीनी) - 1½ tbsp
Shikanji masala (शिकंजी मसाला) - ¾ tsp 
Chilled Water (ठंडा पानी) -  300ml / 1¼ cups
Ice cubes (बर्फ) - 4-5 nos

title: Soft Soft IDLI थाटे इडली | THATTE IDLI | PODI MASALA | Gun Powder | Kunal Kapur
description:
Taking you to the streets of Bangalore with its favorite craving time snack, Thatte Idli served with Podi 😍

Podi is a often relished South Indian masala made with lentils and spices. It's mostly accompanied with Idlis.

Watch the super satisfying process of making Thatte Idli and prepare this amazing recipe at your home.

#thatteidli #plateidli #bangalorespecialidli #idli #idlirecipe #podirecipe #gunpowder #chefkunalkapur #chefkunal 

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Thatte Idli, Idli Podi
Serves - 4

Ingredients:
Idli Rice/Parboiled Rice (इडली राइस) - 2 cups
Poha (पोहा) - ¾ cup (65 gms)
Sabudana (साबूदाना) - 2 tbsp
Water (पानी) - for soaking
Urad Dal, skinless (उड़द दल धुली) - ¾ cup (180 gms)
Fenugreek seeds (मेथी) - ½ tsp
Water (पानी) - for soaking
Water (पानी) - 170 ml/ ¾ cup approx
Water (पानी) - 170 ml/ ¾ cup approx
Salt (नमक) - 1½ tsp approx
Oil (तेल) - to grease

Podi Masala 
Oil (तेल) - a dash
Urad Dal, skinless (उड़द दल धुली) - ½ cup
Chana dal (चना दाल) - ½ cup 
Toor dal (तूर दाल) - 1 tbsp
Cumin (जीरा) - 2 tsp 
Sesame (तिल) - ¼ cup  
Dried red chillies, medium (सूखी लाल मिर्च) - 30 gms/35-40 nos
Oil (तेल) - a dash
Curry leaves (कड़ी पत्ता) - 2 sprigs
Asafoetida (हींग) - 1 tsp
Salt (नमक) - to taste

For Serving
Ghee (घी) -  to drizzle

Today's recipe is all about cherishing this amazing breakfast with Moong Dal Poori and yummy Aloo ki Sabji.

#kunalkapur #holispecial #holispecialfood #masalapuri

Moong Dal Masala Puri, Aloo Sabji
(Serves - 4)

INGREDIENTS -
For Poori Dough (700 gms, 17 poori/40 gms each) 
Moong Dal, skinless (मूंग दल धुली) - ½ cup
Peppercorn (काली मिर्च) - 10 nos

Cumin (जीरा)  - 1 tsp

Red chilli powder (लाल मिर्च पाउडर) - ½ tsp 
Chaat masala (चाट मसाला) - 1 tsp 
Kasuri methi powder (कसूरी मेथी पाउडर) - ¾ tsp 
Water (पानी) - ¾ cup (approx.)

Whole wheat flour (आटा) - 2 cups

Chilli powder (लाल मिर्च पाउडर) - 1½ tsp
Fresh Tomato puree (ताज़े टमाटर की प्यूरी) - 1 cup (using 2-3 nos large tomato)

This time, Chef Kunal Kapur takes us to the royal kitchens of Hyderabad with a dish that defines festivity and tradition – Hyderabadi Haleem! 

A dish that is more than just food—it’s an experience. Especially during Ramazan and Eid, Haleem becomes a symbol of warmth, togetherness, and pure indulgence. And here’s the secret to nailing that same authentic taste at home – Hamdard Khaalis Haleem Masala! Just one pinch, and your Haleem is brimming with the true essence of Hyderabad’s Nawabi flavours.

title: The BEST Crispy Fried Potato Recipe | Chilli Garlic Dip | Quick Snacks Recipe | Kunal Kapur Recipes
description:
आलू को यूंही सब्जियों का राजा नहीं बोलते। जैसी रेसिपी वैसा इसका स्वाद।
Aaj ki recipe is for all my aloo lovers, which is gooey from inside and super crispy from outside, accompanied with spicy and delicious Chilli Dip.

This recipe is a perfect evening snack, no matter the age; everyone will love it equally kyuki iske taste ki guarantee hai meri! 

#crispyfriedpotato #friedpotato #potatoballs #chefkunalkapur #kunalkapur #friedpotatoballs #snacks #quicksnacks #potatorecipe 

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Crispy Fried Potato Balls, Chilli Sauce
Prep time - 20 mins
Cooking time - 25 mins
Serves - 4

Ingredients 
Potato, medium (आलू) - ½ kg (4 nos)
Butter (मखन) - 2½ tbsp
Italian seasoning (इटालियन मसाला) - 1 tbsp
All Purpose Flour (मैदा) - 4 tbsp
Salt (नमक) - to taste
Pepper powder (काली मिर्च पाउडर) - ¾ tsp 
Spring onion, chopped (हरा प्याज़) - ½ cup
Cornstarch (कोर्न्स्टार्च) - 4 tbsp
Oil (तेल) - for frying

Chilli Sauce  
Mustard Oil (सरसों तेल) - ¼ cup 
Dry Kashmiri Chilli, large (सूखी कश्मीरी मिर्च) - 15-17 nos
Heeng (हींग) - ½ tsp
Coriander seeds (ताज़ा धनिया) - 1 tbsp
Cumin seeds (जीरा) - 2 tsp
Garlic cloves, large (लहसुन) –  12 nos
Water (पानी) - a dash 
Lemon, large (नींबू) - 1 nos  
Hung curd (गाढ़ी दही) - ½ cup 
Salt (नमक) - to taste

Method
Firstly, roughly cut the peeled potatoes into smaller pieces. Next, boil the diced potatoes until they can be easily mashed. Once done, strain them and transfer them to a dry vessel, then mash them thoroughly.
In a separate pan, melt some butter and add Italian seasonings along with refined flour. Cook this mixture for about 30 seconds, then add & cook the mashed potatoes until the mixture is completely dry. Spread it out on a deep plate and season with salt, black pepper powder, chili flakes, chopped spring onions, and cornstarch. Knead the mixture well and then form it into small, evenly sized balls. Deep fry the balls until they are golden brown.
For the chili dip, heat some mustard oil in a pan and add dried Kashmiri red chilies. Once you remove the chilies, temper the same oil with asafoetida, coriander seeds, cumin seeds, garlic cloves, and roughly chopped ginger. After tempering, grind all these ingredients together with lemon juice and a dash of water, then transfer the mixture to a bowl. In the same bowl, whisk in hung curd and salt, and your chili dip is ready to serve.

title: Punjab Ka Swad Rara Mutton | राड़ा मीट बनाने का तरीका | Rarha Gosht | Kunal Kapur Meat Recipes
description:
In this episode, Chef Kunal Kapur takes us on a journey to the royal kitchen of Punjab, introducing us to a dish infused with authentic flavors – Punjab ka Rara Meat.

Rara Meat, a dish that’s as rich, flavourful, and soul satisfying as the essence of Punjab itself. Tender morsels of meat, slow-cooked until buttery soft, swim in a luscious gravy infused with Khaalis spices – rich, aromatic, and utterly irresistible. 

And the magic touch Just a sprinkle of Hamdard Khaalis Meat Masala elevates your Rara Meat to an authentic Punjabi masterpiece, brimming with smoky, bold flavors that define the region’s cuisine.

#Hamdard  #HamdardKhaalisSpices #PunjabiCuisine  
#PunjabKaRaraMeat #RoyalKitchen #SlowCookedGoodness  #MeatMasala  
#KhaalisMeatMasala #SpiceBlend #FlavorElevator #AuthenticSpices  
#FoodieAdventures #ChefKunalKapur #FoodLovers

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

In today's episode of India ka Shahi Zaika, we'll explore the history of Rara Meat which comes from the land of taste, Punjab.
Marinated and cooked slowly, this recipe is all you need for a comforting yet delicious meal.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

RARA MEAT RECIPE 

Ingredients: 
For Marinating-
Mutton (मटन नल्ली बोटी चॉप)  - 1 kg
Mutton Mince (कीमा) - 500 gms
Salt (नमक) - 1 tbsp
Curd (दही) - 1 cup
Hamdard Khaalis Meat Masala (मीट मसाला) - 2½ tbsp

For Cooking-
Mustard Oil (सरसों तेल) - ¾ cup
Bay leaf (तेज पत्ता) - 2 nos
Clove (लौंग) - 5-6 nos
Hamdard Khaalis Cardamom (ईलाईची) - 5-6 nos
Onion, chopped (प्याज़) - 1½ cups
Ginger garlic paste (अदरक लहसुन पेस्ट) - 2 tbsp
Water (पानी) - a dash 
Hamdard Khaalis Turmeric (हल्दी) - 1½ tsp
Hamdard Khaalis Red Chilli powder (लाल मिर्च पाउडर) - 2 tsp
Cumin powder (जीरा पाउडर) - 2 tsp
Hamdard Khaalis Coriander powder (धनिया पाउडर) - 2 tbsp
Green chilli, slit (हरी मिर्च) - 4-5 no
Fresh tomatoes puree (ताज़ी टमाटर प्यूरी) - 1½ cups 
Water (पानी) - 5 cups 
Kasoori methi powder (कसूरी मेथी पाउडर) - ½ tsp  
Coriander, chopped (ताज़ा धनिया) - handful

title: Shahi Subz Diwani Handi | Veg Lunch/Dinner Recipe | North Indian Sabzi | Ajwain Paratha| Kunal Kapur
description:
Shahi Subz Handi jo hua karti thi north india ki shaan. Today's recipe is all about delicious royalty. Filled with the goodness of different vegetables, this recipe's soul lies in its gravy which is made up of onions, curd, nuts and other spices.

Watch this video and make this recipe on a special occasion. I'm sure everyone will love it.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

North Ka Tadka Shahi Subz Handi Episode 4 of India Ka Shahi Zaayqa is Out Now! In this episode, Chef Kunal Kapur brings alive the essence of North Ka Tadka Shahi Subz Handi – a dish that defines hearty and wholesome cooking. This sabzi holds a special place in every North Indian kitchen. It’s flavourful yet simple to make, with spices that elevate its taste to royal levels. And let’s not forget its perfect companion – Ajwain Laccha Parantha – crisp, aromatic, and melt-in-your-mouth good. Just one pinch of Hamdard Khaalis Sabzi Masala transforms this dish into a celebration of authentic North Indian taste. With Khaalis Spices, every bite takes you back to the flavours of the North – rich, comforting, and oh-so-delicious. Watch now and bring the North Ka Tadka to your plate!

#IndiaKaShahiZaayqa #NorthKaTadka #ShahiSubzHandi #KunalKapur #HamdardKhaalis #AuthenticFlavours #IndianCuisine #SpicesOfIndia #KhaalisSpices #RoyalTaste #AjwainLacchaParantha #FoodieLove #NorthIndianFood #TasteOfTradition #CookingWithKunal #FlavoursOfIndia

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Shahi Subz Handi, Ajwain Paratha

Ingredients
For Frying 
Oil (तेल) - ¾ cup
Onion, sliced (प्याज़) - 1½ cups

For Veggies

Mushrooms (मशरुम) - 6-8 nos (optional)
Potato, small (आलू) - 3-4 nos

For Grinding 
Cashew nuts - ⅓ cup/ 25 nos approx

Garlic cloves - 5-6 nos
Curd (दही) - 1 cup

For Curry 
Bay Leaf (तेज पत्ता) - 2 nos
Khaalis Turmeric (हल्दी) - ¾ tsp
Khaalis Chilli powder (कश्मीरी मिर्च पाउडर) - 2 tsp
Hamdard Khaalis Subzi Masala - 2½ tbsp
Green chilli slit (हरि मिर्च) - 2 nos 
Salt (नमक) - to taste
Water (पानी) - 3½ cups (approx) 
Corn niblets, boiled (ताज़ा मक्का) - ½ cup
Green peas, boiled (हरा मटर) - ½ cup
Kasoori methi whole (कसूरी मेथी) - 1 tbsp
Fresh coriander, chopped (ताज़ा धनिया) - handful

Ghee (घी) - 1 tbsp

Chilli flakes (कुट्टी मिर्च) - 1 tsp 
Hamdard Khaalis Ajwain (अजवाइन) - a pinch
Oil (तेल) - for frying

title: Aloo Pyaaz Paratha | Mix Veg Raita | Kunal Kapur Lunch/Dinner Punjabi Recipes | आलू प्याज के परांठे
description:
Aloo Pyaaz paratha north india ke har ghar ka staple breakfast hai aur har ghar ka apna alag tareeka hai aur aaj mai share karne wala hu apne ghar ki recipe with amazing raita. 

#AlooPyaazParatha #ParathaRecipe #ChefKunalKapur #ChefKunal #AlooPyaaz #ParathaRecipe #parantha #parantharecipe #breakfastrecipe #LunchRecipe #DinnerRecipe 

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Aloo Pyaz Paratha, Mix Veg Raita
Prep time - 20 mins
Cooking time - 15 mins
Serves - 2
Note - (Net Weight- 780gms)

Ingredients
For dough 
Whole wheat flour (आटा) - 2 cups 
Salt (नमक) - ½ tsp 
Water (पानी) - as required
Oil (तेल) - a dash 

For Filling
Boiled Potatoes, small (उबला आलू)  - 4 nos
Onion, chopped (प्याज़) - ½ cup 
Turmeric (हल्दी) - ½ tsp 
Chilli powder (मिर्ची पाउडर) - 1 tsp 
Coriander powder (धनिया पाउडर) - 1 tbsp
Cumin (जीरा) - 1 tsp 
Kasoori methi (कसूरी मेथी) - a large pinch 
Ginger, grated (कद्दूकस अदरक) - 2 tsp
Green chilli, chopped (हरि मिर्च) - 2 nos
Coriander, chopped (ताज़ा धनिया) - handful
Salt (नमक) - to taste 
Chaat masala (चाट मसाला) - 1 tsp 
Oil (तेल) - to fry 
Whole wheat flour (सूखा आटा) - for rolling

Mix Veg Raita
Curd, thick (दही) - 2 cups
Cucumber, small (खीरा) - 1 no
Carrot grated, small (गाजर) - 1 no
Onion, chopped (प्याज़) - 2 tbsp
Tomato chopped, medium (टमाटर) - 1 no
Coriander, chopped (ताज़ा धनिया) - handful
Green chilli, chopped (हरि मिर्च) - 1 nos
Salt (नमक) - to taste
Black salt (काला नमक) - ½ tsp 
Roasted cumin, crushed (भुना जीरा) - 1½ tsp  
Oil (तेल) - 2 tbsp
Heeng (हींग) - ¾ tsp

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

For complete recipe - https://www.chefkunalkapur.com/recipe/aloo-pyaz-paratha/

title: Hot Chocolate 3 WAYS | With Cocoa Powder, Chocolate & Spices | Winter Special Kunal Kapur Recipes
description:
Tis the season of cozy vibes and hot chocolate 🤩 
Today's recipe is all about Hot Chocolate and that too in 3 delicious ways. Watch this recipe, try it yourself and make your loved ones feel warm in this winter season.

#hotchocolaterecipe  #hotchoco  #hotchocolatemilk  #winterecipe  #cheflife #chefkunalkapur #kunalkapur #chocolatemilk #dessertrecipe  #milk 

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Hot Chocolate
Three ways (with cocoa powder, with chocolate, with spices)

Ingredients:
With Cocoa Powder - 
Milk (दूध) - 2 cups 
Milk (दूध) - 1 cup 
Cornflour (कॉर्नफ्लोर) - 1 tbsp
Sugar (चीनी) - 3 tbsp 
Cocoa powder (कोको पाउडर) - 3 tbsp 
Vanilla essence (वैनिला एसेंस) - few drops
Salt (नमक) - a pinch 
Whipped cream (फेंटी हुई क्रीम) - for garnish
Cocoa powder (कोको पाउडर) - for dusting

With Chocolate - 
Milk (दूध) - 3 cups
Dark Chocolate, chopped - 1 cup(200gms)
Sugar (चीनी) - 1 tbsp
Vanilla essence (वैनिला एसेंस) - few drops
Salt (नमक) - a pinch 
Molten chocolate (पिघली हुई चॉकलेट) - for garnishing
Marshmallow (मार्शमेल्लो) - for topping

With Spices - 
Milk (दूध) - 2 cups 
Cinnamon, medium (दालचीनी) - 1 stick 
Cloves (लौंग) - 4 nos
Fennel seeds (सौंफ) - 1½ tbsp
Cocoa powder (कोको पाउडर) - 1 tbsp
Dark Chocolate, chopped (डार्क चॉकलेट) - 1 cup/200gms
Sugar (चीनी) - 1½ tbsp 
Dry ginger powder (सौंठ पाउडर) - 1 tsp 
Nutmeg, grated (जयफल) - a large pinch 
Vanilla essence (वैनिला एसेंस) - few drops
Orange rind (संतरे का छिलका) - few strands
Milk (दूध) - 1 cup 
Cornflour (कॉर्नफ्लोर) - 1 tbsp

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

title: Makar Sankranti Spl Til Gur Laddoo | Dry Fruit Ladoo | टिल गुड़ के लड्डू | Kunal Kapur Dessert Recipe
description:
तिल, गुड़ और ड्राई फ्रूट्स से बना मकर संक्रान्ति स्पेशल लड्डू

This recipe contains all the goodness you need to survive through winter. Til aur Gur ke laddoo will be a treat to your sweet tooth and provide you with the required energy at the same time.

Super healthy and super delicious laddoos, ready with only a few ingredients. Watch the full video and let me know ki aapko ye recipe kitni achi lagi!

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


Til Gur Dry Fruit Ladoo 

Prep time – 15 mins
Cooking time – 10 mins
Note – Makes – 400 gms (12nos)

Ingredients:
Sesame Seeds, White (तिल) – 1 cup + 2 tbsp (170 gms)
Black Cardamom (काली ईलाइची) – 2-3 nos
Jaggery, crushed (गुड) – ¾ cup (150 gms)
Almonds (बादाम) – ¼ cup 
Peanuts (मूँगफली) – ¼ cup 
Pista (पिस्ता) – ¼ cup 
Cashews (काजू) – ¼ cup
Walnut (अखरोट) – ¼ cup 
Desi Ghee (देसी घी) – 1 tbsp

Check out the complete written recipe with images, here: https://www.chefkunalkapur.com/recipe/til-gur-laddoo/

title: Masala Paneer Ki Sabzi | NO-ONION, GARLIC, TOMATO Recipe | ग्रेवी वाला पनीर | Kunal Kapur Recipes
description:
No Onion, No Garlic & No Tomato lekin phir bhi hum banayenge yummy si Paneer ki Sabji. This curry is super easy to make and can impress your guests in a second. 

You'll see more no onion, garlic recipe on my channel this year. So, stay tuned and keep watching!

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

No Onion, Garlic, No Tomato Paneer Ki Sabji
Prep time - 15 mins
Cooking time - 35 mins
Serves - 2 

Ingredients:
 
For Marination - 
Paneer (पनीर) - 300 gms
Mustard Oil (सरसों तेल) - 3 tbsp
Chilli Powder (मिर्च पाउडर) - 1 tsp
Turmeric (हल्दी) - ½ tsp 
Chaat Masala (चाट मसाला) - 2 tsp 
Salt (नमक) - ¾ tsp
Kasoori methi powder (कसूरी मेथी पाउडर) - ½ tsp 
 
For Paste -
Cashew Nut/Peanuts (काजू) - ⅓ cup 
Green Chillies (हरि मिर्च) - 2 nos 
Ginger (अदरक) - a small piece
Curd (दही) - 1½ cups 
 
For Curry -
Mustard Oil (सरसों तेल) - 4 tbsp
Black Cardamom (काली इलाइची) - 2 nos 
Cloves (लौंग) - 10 nos
Kalonji (कलौंजी) - ½ tsp
Cumin (जीरा) - 1 tsp 
Heeng (हींग) - ¾ tsp 
Green Chilli (हरि मिर्च) - 1 no 
Turmeric (हल्दी) - ½ tsp
Chilli Powder (मिर्च पाउडर) - 2 tsp
Coriander Powder (धनिया पाउडर) - 1½ tbsp
Salt (नमक) - to taste 
Green Chillies, slit (हरि मिर्च) - 1-2 nos 
Water (पानी) - 2½ cups
Kasoori Methi Powder (कसूरी मेथी पाउडर) - a pinch 
Garam Masala (गरम मसाला) - a pinch
Black Pepper, crushed (काली मिर्च) - ½ tsp 
Coriander, chopped (ताज़ा धनिया) - handful
Chilli Oil (रोगन) - a dash 

For complete recipe, click here - https://www.chefkunalkapur.com/recipe/paneer-ki-sabji/

title: Purani Dilli Ki Nihari/Nahari | पुरानी दिल्ली की नहारी बनाने का आसान तरीका | Chef Kunal Kapur Recipe
description:
From the corridors of history, We present you the famous, royal and delicious recipe of Dill ki Nihari.

This recipe will take you to streets of Purani Dilli with its aroma and authentic flavors. Hamdard Khalis Nihari Masala makes this recipe super delicious. 

This winter, try it for your loved ones and make their day super special.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

India Ka Shahi Zaayqa, Episode 2 is out now!

Continuing the journey of regional food celebration, this time Chef Kunal Kapur dives into the heart of Purani Dilli to recreate the iconic Dilli Ki Nihari – a dish steeped in rich flavours and even richer history. Joined by Chef Osama, the duo brings to life fascinating stories behind this royal delicacy, Dilli ki shaan, Dilli ki jaan, Dilli ki Nihari!

And with Hamdard Khaalis Spices, the magic of Dilli’s nihari can now grace your kitchen with the same authentic taste and aroma.

Watch now and let the taste take you to the bylanes of Dilli ka khaas andaaz with Hamdard Khaalis Nihari Masala!

#IndiaKaShahiZaayqa #Episode2 #DilliKiNihari #ChefKunalKapur
#ChefOsama #PuraniDilliFlavors #HamdardKhaalisSpices #AuthenticTaste
#RegionalFoodCelebration #DilliKaKhaasAndaaz #NihariLovers #FoodieDelights #RoyalFlavors #HamdardKhaalisNihariMasala #ViralRecipe #HamdardKhaalisMasala

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Dilli Ki Nihari

Ingredients: 
Oil (तेल) - ½ cup 
Onion, sliced (प्याज़) - 1½ cups 
Ginger garlic paste (अदरक लहसुन पेस्ट) - 3 tbsp
Fresh Tomato puree (तजी टमाटर प्यूरी) - 2 cups
Mutton, curry cut (मटन) - 1 kg 
Salt (नमक) - to taste
Hamdard Khaalis Nihari Masala (निहारी मसाला) - 2½ tbsp
Hamdard Khaalis Red Chilli Powder (मिर्ची पाउडर) - 1 tbsp
Ginger powder (सौंठ पाउडर) - 2 tsp 
Fennel powder (सौंफ़ पाउडर) - 2 tsp 
All purpose flour (मैदा) – ½ cup 
Water (पानी) - 1 cup 

For Garnish:
Green chilli, chopped (हरि मिर्च)
Ginger julienne (अदरक)
Coriander sprigs (ताज़ा धनिया) 

Check out complete written recipe for Dilli Ki Nihari Mutton here: https://www.chefkunalkapur.com/recipe/dilli-ki-nihari-mutton/
